title: Relevant date
content:
For the purposes of and subject to this Part, relevant date (有關日
Last updated date
16.6.2023
Employment Ordinance
Part VIA	
6A-16
Section 32E	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
期)—
	
(a)	
in relation to the termination of employment of an 
employee, has the same meaning as in section 2(1); and
	
(b)	
in relation to the employer varying the terms of the 
contract of employment of an employee, means the date 
on which that variation takes effect.
